title: UX Widget Interface
text: UX Widget Interface Web Widgets define the UX and UI of your web application. With UX Widget Interfaces you can implement your own UX Widgets, with layout constructs that match your preferred UI design. By implementing your UI with UX Widget Interfaces you can: Isolate UX/UI from the business logic in your Uniface components. Reuse UX/UI, including client (browser) and server-side presentation logic. Prevent interference with the Document Object Model (DOM) structure by any used 3 rd- party libraries. This allows Uniface developers to build applications that have a feature-rich consistent user interface, and focus on low-code development, productively building applications that focus on business constructs. Related learning videos Title link Uniface UX Widget Interface Related Links Widget Reference: Dynamic Server Pages Widgets in dynamic server pages (DSPs) determine the appearance and behavior of fields, labels, occurrences, and entities displayed in the client browser.
